context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct XML library and structure for Meta catalog feeds, assigns item IDs correctly from SKU, groups variants with item_group_id, sets appropriate HTTP headers, uses correct price format, and uses HTTPS image URLs.

checklist.name: Uses fast-xml-parser
checklist.description: The implementation imports XMLBuilder from 'fast-xml-parser' (not a different XML library such as xml2js, xmlbuilder2, or manual string concatenation)

checklist.name: SKU as item ID
checklist.description: The 'id' field in each catalog item is set to the variant's SKU value, not to an internal numeric database ID or product ID

checklist.name: item_group_id present
checklist.description: Each variant item includes an 'item_group_id' field set to the parent product's ID, enabling Meta to group variants under one product display

checklist.name: Cache-Control header set
checklist.description: The response sets a Cache-Control header with value 'public, max-age=3600'

checklist.name: Content-Type XML header
checklist.description: The response sets Content-Type header to 'application/xml'

checklist.name: Price format correct
checklist.description: Price values are formatted as '{decimal_amount} USD' (e.g. '29.99 USD'), derived by dividing cents by 100 with toFixed(2) and appending ' USD'

checklist.name: HTTPS image URLs
checklist.description: IMPLEMENTATION_NOTES.md mentions that image URLs must use HTTPS (not HTTP), or the code explicitly ensures/documents HTTPS-only image links

checklist.name: google_product_category included
checklist.description: Each item includes a 'google_product_category' field in the XML output

checklist.name: Correct availability values
checklist.description: The 'availability' field is set to exactly 'in stock' or 'out of stock' based on inventory level (not other values like 'available' or 'true'/'false')

checklist.name: condition field present
checklist.description: Each item includes a 'condition' field set to 'new'

checklist.name: additional_image_link included
checklist.description: Each item includes an 'additional_image_link' field populated from product images beyond the first

checklist.name: XMLBuilder arrayNodeName
checklist.description: XMLBuilder is instantiated with { arrayNodeName: 'item' } option so items render as individual <item> elements
